nodes.name: Taliabu masked owl
nodes.summary: Taliabu masked owl（Tyto nigrobrunnea）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Taliabu masked owl。

nodes.name: Taliabu masked owl
nodes.summary: The Taliabu masked owl (Tyto nigrobrunnea), also known as the Taliabu owl or the Sula Islands barn owl, is an owl in the barn owl family, Tytonidae. This is one of the two groups of owls, the other being the typical owls, family Strigidae. It is endemic to Taliabu Island of Indonesia. This species was first identified in 1938 when the type specimen, an adult female, was collected. The species was not seen again until 1991, but has since been observed on at least 16 separate occasions. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet
